spec_issues.issue: Task description assumed empty page ratio thresholds of 0.10/0.20 but actual SPEC and code use 0.25 with strict > comparison
spec_issues.recommendation: No action needed — code matches SPEC correctly at 0.25 threshold

learnings: Trust score uses >= comparison at 0.65 boundary (confirmed by test)
Confidence auto-accept uses strict < at 0.70 boundary — score of exactly 0.70 is auto-accepted
Confidence block uses strict < at 0.50 boundary — score of exactly 0.50 is NOT blocked
Empty page ratio uses strict > at 0.25 boundary — ratio of exactly 0.25 does not trigger warning
Empty page ratio has body_page_count > 10 guard — books with 10 or fewer pages are exempt
With discrete factor scores, the closest achievable trust values near 0.65 are 0.6425 (below) and 0.6575 (above)
Critical_low override (author<0.30 AND tahqiq<0.40) cannot fire during first intake because minimum author_standing is 0.30
Both engine._build_needs_review and metadata_inference.build_needs_review implement the same < 0.70 threshold — both paths tested
